subcodes.title: Words to E.J. Rosenberg et al, spoken around Feb. 1901
subcodes.first_line: There are two forms of prayer in this religion, that is the obligatory prayers... There is also the form of prayer to which the name 'supplication' has been given
subcodes.subjects: @law of obligatory prayer, @the state of prayer; dynamics of prayer, @religious rituals minimized or eliminated
